tog.name: Endovier
tog.bio: A salt-mine prison camp where Celaena is held.

tog.name: The Glass Castle
tog.bio: The royal seat rising above Rifthold.

tog.name: Terrasen
tog.bio: A northern kingdom referenced in the wider history of Erilea.

tog.name: Adarlan
tog.bio: The expanding kingdom that controls Endovier, Rifthold, and the royal court.

tog.name: Eyllwe
tog.bio: Nehemia’s homeland, resisting occupation and violence by Adarlan.

tog.name: The Castle Library
tog.bio: A vast royal collection where Celaena reads, researches, and begins tracing forbidden history.

tog.name: The Secret Tunnels
tog.bio: Hidden passages connecting Celaena’s rooms to older structures beneath the castle.

tog.name: Elena and Gavin’s Tomb
tog.bio: An ancient tomb protected by Wyrdmarks and concealed beneath the royal complex.

tog.name: The Clock Tower
tog.bio: A black stone tower whose strange markings and hidden nature become central to the final duel.

tog.name: The Champion Training Hall
tog.bio: The practice and testing space where the contestants train under Brullo and Chaol.

com.name: Rifthold
com.bio: The capital where Celaena conducts the king’s missions and secretly investigates the resistance.

com.name: The Glass Castle
com.bio: The royal seat whose rooms, towers, library, and hidden foundations contain several dangerous secrets.

com.name: The Willows
com.bio: An elegant tea salon where Celaena arranges a carefully staged meeting with Archer Finn.

com.name: The Winter Fair
com.bio: A seasonal fair visited by Celaena, Chaol, and Dorian, including Baba Yellowlegs’s wagon.

com.name: Calaculla
com.bio: A brutal labor camp where people of Eyllwe are imprisoned under Adarlanian control.

com.name: Queen Elena’s Tomb
com.bio: An ancient chamber guarded by Mort and connected to Wyrdmarks, Damaris, and the history of the Wyrdkeys.

com.name: The Secret Tunnels
com.bio: A hidden network linking Celaena’s rooms, Elena’s tomb, the library, and older parts of the castle.

com.name: The Vaults
com.bio: A dangerous den where Celaena searches for information about Grave.

com.name: The Clock Tower
com.bio: An obsidian structure above corrupted passages and experiments tied to the Wyrdkeys.

com.name: Morath
com.bio: Duke Perrington’s stronghold, where Kaltain is taken and darker plans appear to be developing.

com.name: Wendlyn
com.bio: A kingdom beyond Adarlan where Fae and magic endure, chosen as Celaena’s next destination.

acotar1.name: The Mortal Lands
acotar1.bio: The human territory where Feyre and her family live.

acotar1.name: The Wall
acotar1.bio: The boundary separating the mortal lands from Prythian.

hoeab.name: Lunathion
hoeab.bio: The metropolis commonly called Crescent City.

hoeab.name: Moonwood
hoeab.bio: A district associated with wolves and shifters.

hoeab.name: The Bone Quarter
hoeab.bio: A district beyond the Istros associated with the dead.
